element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single main claw attack throughout game; player must learn timing and reach
Traversal mechanic that opens vertical space navigation
Platforming precision required to access new areas
Required enemy destruction percentage gates progress to next areas
Environmental puzzles grant access to new multi-floored areas
Character-specific boss fights (Lady Deathstrike, Shinobi Shaw, etc.)
Game over if time expires; resets at checkpoints
Automatic health regeneration over time; central mechanic for survival

typical_tension_triggers: Required enemy destruction gates blocking progression
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tense time-management pressure balanced against healing recovery; tension escalates toward stage bosses; relief cycles through checkpoint resets

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory enemy encounters with moderate platforming; learning basic claw attack and wall climbing mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Complex multi-floored level navigation; increased puzzle-solving requirements; stronger enemy density requiring destruction percentage gates
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss-heavy progression; cumulative platforming mastery required; tighter time management with healing factor recovery as primary survival tool
notable_spikes: Stage-end boss encounters (Lady Deathstrike, Shinobi Shaw, Great Beast)
Multi-floored catacomb sections requiring precise climbing and jumping
Cyber hallucinogenic nightmare sequence (requires toxin mechanic reversal)

notable_level_patterns.description: Large multi-floored levels require either enemy destruction percentage completion (SNES) or puzzle solving (Genesis) to unlock access to new areas; vertical navigation essential
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Inner Circle mansion leading to catacombs

notable_level_patterns.description: Deep underground sections serve as level climax; increasing depth correlates with final boss encounters; significant backtracking through vertical space
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Catacombs below Inner Circle mansion (final Fugue fight, Great Beast encounter)

notable_level_patterns.description: Checkpoints reset the Elsie-Dee timer, creating rhythmic relief moments within stages; typically spaced to create moderate pressure cycles
Each stage concludes with mandatory boss encounter; character-specific fights tied to narrative progression (Wendigo → Lady Deathstrike → Sabretooth → Cyber → Shaw → Beast)
